description:
Join us on Wednesday, June 17, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a Domaine Roland Lavantureux tasting featuring Chablis, Petit Chablis, Bourgogne Tonnerre and Bourgogne Epineuil.

Tasting Fee: $35 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Domaine Roland Lavantureux Chablis Vaux Carres 2023 - $39.99 - Citrus, green apple, oyster shell and chalk with a precise, saline finish.
  • Roland Lavantureux Petit Chablis 2023 - $34.99 - Floral, flinty and fresh, with citrus, apple and limestone-driven lift.
  • Roland Lavantureux Bourgogne Tonnerre 2022 - $35.99 - Orchard fruit, oyster-shell minerality and a rounder Bourgogne Blanc texture.
  • Roland Lavantureux Bourgogne Epineuil 2022 - $39.99 - Crunchy red fruit, floral lift, peppery spice and bright Pinot Noir finesse.

Come taste through Domaine Roland Lavantureux and find your favorite bottle. Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.
title: Roland Lavantureux Tasting
